---
title: "The Rev. Richard Williamson"
---

## The Rev. Richard Williamson

**Dates:** (1802-1865)

### Description

Rector of Sutton Coldfield, uncle of Ann Carter Smith

### Biography

Educated at Westminster and Trinity College, Cambridge, priest 1829, Headmaster of Westminster School 1828-1846, Rector of Sutton Coldfield 1844-50, Vicar of Pershore 1850-66, Hon. Canon of Worcester;  he married (1833) Anne Gray, daughter of the Bishop of Bristol, uncle of Ann Carter Smith. [<i>Alumni Cantabrigienses</i>]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
